The Isle of Armor Pokédex

The Expansion Pass to Pokémon Sword & Shield adds over 200 Pokémon that were not originally available. A free update to the game allows these Pokémon to be traded for, or transferred in from Pokémon Home, but the DLC must be purchased in order to visit the new areas and catch them in the wild.

The Expansion Pass comes in two parts - The Isle of Armor and The Crown Tundra. Below we list the new and returning Pokémon that will be available in The Isle of Armor, released in June 2020. See The Crown Tundra Pokédex for Pokémon available in the second part.

Sword/Shield main page

Psychic
